source: PULSE- Self-Supervised Photo Upsampling via Latent Space Exploration of Generative Models.pdf

concepts.finding: PULSE performs super-resolution by searching the latent space of a pretrained GAN for a high-resolution image that downscales to the input low-resolution image.
concepts.implication: Latent space exploration in pretrained models can solve inverse problems, applicable to query expansion: search latent space of query embeddings to find related queries mapping to the same intent.
concepts.open_question: Can latent space exploration of query embeddings improve query expansion and recall for rare queries?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A PULSE-inspired latent search over query embedding space will generate query expansions that improve recall@100 by 20%+ for tail queries.
